Minotaur's Valor Plate Mail

When the unit takes 150000 damage, they go into frenzy. They increase in size and all their stats are increased by 10% for 3 sec.
When this effect triggers a 3 times, the unit goes into bestial frenzy. They increase in size and all their stats are increased by 25% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
